perks.title: Member Perks
perks.description: GameNight Hub members get exclusive access to features built for serious board game enthusiasts. From priority event registration to community voting rights, your membership unlocks the full board game social experience. Join a community that takes the hobby as seriously as you do.

createAccount.title: Create your account
createAccount.description: Sign up and join a growing community of board game enthusiasts across Spain

completeProfile.title: Complete your profile
completeProfile.description: Set up your game preferences, collection, and location to get personalized recommendations

unlockAccess.title: Unlock exclusive access
unlockAccess.description: Get instant access to member-only features, priority registration, and community privileges

xp.title: XP & Levels
xp.description: Earn experience points every time you engage with the community — host events, RSVP to game nights, and build out your profile. As your XP grows, your level rises and new privileges open up. The more you play, the more the platform rewards you.

hostGameNight.title: Host a game night
hostGameNight.description: Organise an event and bring players together — earn +50 XP for every night you host

rsvp.title: RSVP to an event
rsvp.description: Show up and play — every confirmed attendance adds +10 XP to your total

completeProfile.title: Complete your profile
completeProfile.description: Fill in your preferences, collection, and location once and pocket +25 XP

badges.title: Achievements
badges.description: Earn badges by staying active in the community — the more you play, the more you unlock. Build your collection, host game nights, and show off your dedication with a showcase that speaks for itself.

earlyAdopter.title: Be an early adopter
earlyAdopter.description: Join before the public launch and secure your place among the founding members of GameNight Hub

hostFirst.title: Host your first game night
hostFirst.description: Create and run your first event to become an official host and unlock host-tier achievements

buildCollection.title: Build your collection
buildCollection.description: Add 10 or more games to your personal collection and earn the Collector badge
